test_cases.name: bind_with_zeros
test_cases.description: Bind operation handles zero trits correctly
test_cases.semantic: Zero acts as identity, non-zero multiplies

test_cases.name: bind_nonzero_multiply
test_cases.description: Bind of non-zero trits uses multiplication

test_cases.name: bind_commutative
test_cases.description: Bind operation is commutative

test_cases.name: bind_self_inverse
test_cases.description: Bind is its own inverse

test_cases.name: bind_unbind_identity
test_cases.description: Unbind reverses bind operation
test_cases.semantic: Cosine similarity between original and recovered >= 0.95

test_cases.name: bundle2_with_zero
test_cases.description: Bundle2 handles zero trits correctly
test_cases.semantic: Zero propagates other value, non-zero majority vote

test_cases.name: bundle2_majority_vote
test_cases.description: Bundle2 uses majority voting for non-zero trits

test_cases.name: bundle2_idempotent
test_cases.description: Bundling vector with itself returns same vector

test_cases.name: bundle3_consensus
test_cases.description: Bundle3 uses consensus of three vectors

test_cases.name: bundle3_majority
test_cases.description: Bundle3 of identical vectors returns that vector

test_cases.name: similarity_cosine_identical
test_cases.description: Cosine similarity of identical vectors is 1.0

test_cases.name: similarity_cosine_orthogonal
test_cases.description: Cosine similarity of orthogonal vectors near -1

test_cases.name: similarity_hamming_identical
test_cases.description: Hamming similarity of identical vectors is 1.0

test_cases.name: similarity_hamming_opposite
test_cases.description: Hamming similarity of opposite vectors is 0.0

test_cases.name: similarity_bounds_cosine
test_cases.description: Cosine similarity bounded by [-1, 1]

test_cases.name: similarity_bounds_hamming
test_cases.description: Hamming similarity bounded by [0, 1]

test_cases.name: similarity_symmetry
test_cases.description: Similarity is symmetric: sim(a,b) == sim(b,a)
test_cases.expected_property: sim(a, b) == sim(b, a) within 0.0001 tolerance

test_cases.name: dot_product_identical
test_cases.description: Dot product of identical vectors equals nonzero count

test_cases.name: hamming_distance_identical
test_cases.description: Hamming distance of identical vectors is 0

test_cases.name: hamming_distance_different
test_cases.description: Hamming distance counts differing positions

test_cases.name: vector_norm_zero
test_cases.description: L2 norm of zero vector is 0

test_cases.name: vector_norm_nonzero
test_cases.description: L2 norm of all-non-zero vector is sqrt(n)

test_cases.name: permute_shift_one
test_cases.description: Permutation shifts hypervector by one position

test_cases.name: permute_shift_len_returns_original
test_cases.description: Permutation by length returns original vector

test_cases.name: permute_involutivity
test_cases.description: Permutation by n, then len-n returns original

test_cases.name: coptic_27dim_bind
test_cases.description: 27-dimensional Coptic space bind operation
test_cases.semantic: Same logic as bind, but fixed 27 dimensions

test_cases.name: coptic_bundle3_consensus
test_cases.description: 27-dimensional Coptic space bundle3 consensus

test_cases.name: coptic_similarity_range
test_cases.description: Coptic similarity bounded by [0, 1]

test_cases.name: bind_distributes_over_bundle2
test_cases.description: Bind distributes over bundle2
test_cases.expected_property: bind(a, bundle2(b, c)) == bundle2(bind(a, b), bind(a, c))

test_cases.name: zero_vector_bind_identity
test_cases.description: Zero vector is identity for bind
test_cases.expected_property: bind(zero, x) == x and bind(x, zero) == x
